zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe是Walter de Cantelupe和Melette De Dinan的兒子，於1150年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。他於1177年與Mesceline or Sibilla Braci在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1239年4月7日在英國貝德福爾伊頓 布雷享年89歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾霍頓 姆 斯圖德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe是Walter de Cantelupe和Melette De Dinan的儿子，于1150年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。他于1177年与Mesceline or Sibilla Braci在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1239年4月7日在英国貝德福爾伊頓 布雷享年89岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾霍頓 姆 斯圖德利。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe was born in 1150, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England as the son of Walter de Cantelupe and Melette De Dinan. He married Mesceline or Sibilla Braci in 1177, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 7 April 1239, in Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe est né en 1150, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de Walter de Cantelupe et Melette De Dinan. Il a épousé Mesceline or Sibilla Braci en 1177, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1239, à Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe wurde 1150 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, als Sohn von Walter de Cantelupe und Melette De Dinan geboren. Er hat 1177 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England Mesceline or Sibilla Braci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 7. April 1239 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe è nato il nel 1150 nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England come figlio di Walter de Cantelupe e Melette De Dinan. Lui sposato Mesceline or Sibilla Braci nel 1177, nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 aprile 1239, nel Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupeは1150年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウでWalter de CantelupeとMelette De Dinanの息子として生まれた。1177年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウでMesceline or Sibilla Braciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1239年4月7日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアエアトン ブレイで89歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアホールトン クウム ストゥドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe(은)는 1150년 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루에서 Walter de Cantelupe(와)과 Melette De Dinan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1177년 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루에서 Mesceline or Sibilla Braci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1239년 4월 7일 영국 베드퍼드실르 이턴 브라이에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 호르턴 쿠 스투들리에 묻혔다.

mn.of Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Englan: Ellesborough, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe nasceu em 1150, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de Walter de Cantelupe e Melette De Dinan. Ele casou-se com Mesceline or Sibilla Braci em 1177, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1239, em Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe родился в 1150 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Walter de Cantelupe и Melette De Dinan. Он женился на женщине по имени Mesceline or Sibilla Braci в 1177 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 7 апреля 1239 г. в местности эатон брэи, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности хауртон кум студли, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe nació en 1150, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Walter de Cantelupe y Melette De Dinan. Se casó con Mesceline or Sibilla Braci en 1177, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de abril de 1239, en Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Horton cum Studley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
